# Letter to Herodotus

*[Epicurus](../philosophers/epicurus.md) · 300 BCE*

A letter in which [Epicurus](../philosophers/epicurus.md) sets out his atomist physics in summary: the universe is made only of atoms and void, and every phenomenon is explained by their motion, with no divine intervention. It grounds the liberation from fears at which his ethics aims.
